english: Strike Opponent's Ears with Both Fists
visual: Bow stance with both fists swinging in wide upward arcs to meet at head height, as if striking an opponent's temples.
motion_description: The person shifts their weight forward onto the left leg, bending the knee to form a front bow stance while keeping the torso upright and facing squarely forward. Concurrently, both hands close into fists and sweep from near the hips outward and upward in wide, symmetrical arcs. The continuous, steady motion culminates in a deliberate pause as the fists converge at head height in front of the body, with the elbows held slightly bent and flared outward.
